chunks: DOCUMENT 1

HOTEL: Seaside Paradise Resort DESCRIPTION: Luxury beachfront resort with stunning ocean views. Located just steps from Malibu Beach. LOCATION: Coastal Road, Malibu Beach DISTANCE TO BEACH: 50 meters RATING: 4.7/5
DOCUMENT 2
HOTEL: Seaside Paradise Resort AMENITIES: free WiFi, breakfast buffet, pool, spa, parking, beach access
DOCUMENT 3
HOTEL: Seaside Paradise Resort POLICIES: - Check-in: 3:00 PM - Check-out: 11:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: Pets not allowed
DOCUMENT 4
HOTEL: Seaside Paradise Resort GUEST REVIEWS: - Amazing beach view from the room! - Great breakfast selection - Staff was very friendly
DOCUMENT 5
HOTEL: Seaside Paradise Resort LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Coastal Road, Malibu Beach Nearby: Beach is 50 meters away
DOCUMENT 6
HOTEL: City Central Hotel DESCRIPTION: Modern hotel in the heart of downtown. Close to shopping and business district. LOCATION: Downtown, 5th Avenue DISTANCE TO BEACH: 15 km RATING: 4.2/5
DOCUMENT 7
HOTEL: City Central Hotel AMENITIES: free WiFi, business center, fitness center, restaurant, room service, free breakfast
DOCUMENT 8
HOTEL: City Central Hotel POLICIES: - Check-in: 2:00 PM - Check-out: 12:00 PM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: Small pets allowed ($50 fee)
DOCUMENT 9
HOTEL: City Central Hotel GUEST REVIEWS: - Perfect for business travelers - Clean rooms, good location - Breakfast could be better
DOCUMENT 10
HOTEL: City Central Hotel LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Downtown, 5th Avenue Nearby: Beach is 15 km away
DOCUMENT 11
HOTEL: Sunny Garden Inn DESCRIPTION: Cozy garden hotel with home-like atmosphere. Perfect for families and nature lovers. LOCATION: Suburb Heights, Park Street DISTANCE TO BEACH: 8 km RATING: 4.5/5
DOCUMENT 12
HOTEL: Sunny Garden Inn AMENITIES: free WiFi, free breakfast, garden, bicycle rental, free parking
DOCUMENT 13
HOTEL: Sunny Garden Inn POLICIES: - Check-in: 1:00 PM - Check-out: 10:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 7 days before check-in - Pet Policy: Pets allowed (no extra fee)
DOCUMENT 14
HOTEL: Sunny Garden Inn GUEST REVIEWS: - Beautiful garden and peaceful atmosphere - Very reasonable prices - Friendly hosts
DOCUMENT 15
HOTEL: Sunny Garden Inn LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Suburb Heights, Park Street Nearby: Beach is 8 km away
DOCUMENT 16
HOTEL: Luxury Grand Plaza DESCRIPTION: 5-star luxury hotel with world-class amenities. Prime waterfront location. LOCATION: Waterfront Drive, Marina Bay DISTANCE TO BEACH: 200 meters RATING: 4.9/5
DOCUMENT 17
HOTEL: Luxury Grand Plaza AMENITIES: free high-speed WiFi, premium breakfast, infinity pool, luxury spa, valet parking, concierge, beach shuttle
DOCUMENT 18
HOTEL: Luxury Grand Plaza POLICIES: - Check-in: 4:00 PM - Check-out: 12:00 PM - Cancellation: No cancellation within 14 days - Pet Policy: Service animals only
DOCUMENT 19
HOTEL: Luxury Grand Plaza GUEST REVIEWS: - Absolute luxury experience! - Best hotel I've ever stayed at - Amazing infinity pool overlooking the bay
DOCUMENT 20
HOTEL: Luxury Grand Plaza LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Waterfront Drive, Marina Bay Nearby: Beach is 200 meters away
DOCUMENT 21

HOTEL: Budget Stay Hostel DESCRIPTION: Affordable accommodation for budget travelers. Social atmosphere and clean facilities. LOCATION: Backpacker Lane, Near Train Station DISTANCE TO BEACH: 12 km RATING: 4.0/5
DOCUMENT 22
HOTEL: Budget Stay Hostel AMENITIES: free WiFi, shared kitchen, lockers, common lounge, free coffee
DOCUMENT 23
HOTEL: Budget Stay Hostel POLICIES: - Check-in: 11:00 AM - Check-out: 10:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: No pets allowed
DOCUMENT 24
HOTEL: Budget Stay Hostel GUEST REVIEWS: - Great value for money - Clean and friendly - Perfect for backpackers
DOCUMENT 25
HOTEL: Budget Stay Hostel LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Backpacker Lane, Near Train Station Nearby: Beach is 12 km away
DOCUMENT 26

HOTEL: Ocean View Villas DESCRIPTION: Luxury private villas perched on the cliffs. Each villa has panoramic ocean views. LOCATION: Cliffside Road, Pacific Heights DISTANCE TO BEACH: 100 meters RATING: 4.8/5
DOCUMENT 27
HOTEL: Ocean View Villas AMENITIES: free WiFi, private pool, beach access, parking, fully equipped kitchen, BBQ area
DOCUMENT 28
HOTEL: Ocean View Villas POLICIES: - Check-in: 3:00 PM - Check-out: 11:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in - Pet Policy: Pets allowed with deposit
DOCUMENT 29
HOTEL: Ocean View Villas GUEST REVIEWS: - Breathtaking ocean views - Perfect for groups - Very private and quiet
DOCUMENT 30
HOTEL: Ocean View Villas LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Cliffside Road, Pacific Heights Nearby: Beach is 100 meters away
DOCUMENT 31

HOTEL: Airport Transit Hotel DESCRIPTION: Convenient airport hotel perfect for transit passengers. 24/7 service and airport shuttle. LOCATION: Terminal Road, Airport Area DISTANCE TO BEACH: 20 km RATING: 4.1/5
DOCUMENT 32
HOTEL: Airport Transit Hotel AMENITIES: free WiFi, 24-hour reception, shuttle service, basic breakfast, soundproof rooms
DOCUMENT 33
HOTEL: Airport Transit Hotel POLICIES: - Check-in: Flexible (any time) - Check-out: Flexible (any time) - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 6 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: Pets not allowed
DOCUMENT 34
HOTEL: Airport Transit Hotel GUEST REVIEWS: - Convenient for early flights - Basic but clean - Shuttle service is reliable
DOCUMENT 35
HOTEL: Airport Transit Hotel LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Terminal Road, Airport Area Nearby: Beach is 20 km away
DOCUMENT 36
HOTEL: Mountain View Retreat DESCRIPTION: Peaceful retreat in the mountains. Perfect for nature enthusiasts and hikers. LOCATION: Hill Top Road, Pine Forest DISTANCE TO BEACH: 25 km RATING: 4.6/5
DOCUMENT 37
HOTEL: Mountain View Retreat AMENITIES: free WiFi, breakfast included, hiking trails, bonfire area, mountain views
DOCUMENT 38
HOTEL: Mountain View Retreat POLICIES: - Check-in: 2:00 PM - Check-out: 11:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in - Pet Policy: Pets allowed
DOCUMENT 39
HOTEL: Mountain View Retreat GUEST REVIEWS: - Stunning mountain scenery - Great hiking opportunities - Cozy and warm atmosphere
DOCUMENT 40
HOTEL: Mountain View Retreat LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Hill Top Road, Pine Forest Nearby: Beach is 25 km away
DOCUMENT 41
HOTEL: Family Fun Resort DESCRIPTION: Resort designed especially for families. Kids stay free and plenty of activities. LOCATION: Resort Drive, Kid's Paradise DISTANCE TO BEACH: 5 km RATING: 4.4/5
DOCUMENT 42
HOTEL: Family Fun Resort AMENITIES: free WiFi, free breakfast, children's pool, playground, family rooms, game room, free parking
DOCUMENT 43
HOTEL: Family Fun Resort POLICIES: - Check-in: 3:00 PM - Check-out: 11:00 AM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: No pets
DOCUMENT 44
HOTEL: Family Fun Resort GUEST REVIEWS: - Kids loved the playground - Very family-friendly - Great activities for children
DOCUMENT 45
HOTEL: Family Fun Resort LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Resort Drive, Kid's Paradise Nearby: Beach is 5 km away
DOCUMENT 46

HOTEL: Business Elite Suites DESCRIPTION: Premium business hotel with dedicated workspace areas. Located in the financial hub. LOCATION: Financial District, Tower Road DISTANCE TO BEACH: 18 km RATING: 4.7/5
DOCUMENT 47
HOTEL: Business Elite Suites AMENITIES: free high-speed WiFi, business lounge, meeting rooms, free breakfast, airport transfer, concierge
DOCUMENT 48
HOTEL: Business Elite Suites POLICIES: - Check-in: 12:00 PM - Check-out: 1:00 PM - Cancellation: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before check-in - Pet Policy: No pets
DOCUMENT 49
HOTEL: Business Elite Suites GUEST REVIEWS: - Perfect for business trips - Excellent workspace facilities - Fast reliable WiFi
DOCUMENT 50
HOTEL: Business Elite Suites LOCATION DETAILS: Address: Financial District, Tower Road Nearby: Beach is 18 km away
DOCUMENT 51
CANCELLATION POLICY STANDARD: Most hotels offer free cancellation. Specific terms vary by hotel. Always check individual hotel policies.
DOCUMENT 52
CHECK-IN/CHECK-OUT STANDARD: Standard check-in is 2-4 PM. Standard check-out is 10 AM-12 PM. Early check-in may be available upon request.
DOCUMENT 53
PET POLICY OVERVIEW: Pet policies vary. Some hotels allow pets with fees, others are pet-free except service animals.
DOCUMENT 54
BREAKFAST INFORMATION: Many hotels offer complimentary breakfast. Types include continental, buffet, and made-to-order options.
DOCUMENT 55
BEACH ACCESS: Hotels listed as 'near beach' are typically within 500 meters. Beach access may be public or private.
